query: SELECT id, logDomain, logPhase, logStep, logSeverity, logMethod, logDetail, DATE_FORMAT(logCreatedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created FROM attack_logs WHERE logDomain LIKE '%hiawatha%' AND logCreatedAt > '2026-03-17 21:00:00' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LsDtjPqt12uZuy.1287516f661f --database 5QWxsXug7WsY3BLQHWP3Uh --execute SELECT id, logDomain, logPhase, logStep, logSeverity, logMethod, logDetail, DATE_FORMAT(logCreatedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created FROM attack_logs WHERE logDomain LIKE '%hiawatha%' AND logCreatedAt > '2026-03-17 21:00:00' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 20;
